title: Config
description: Root of the TOML-in-repo config (`.insect/bugbot.toml` or equivalent). Defines which finding categories run, severity floors, custom rules, noise-budget, provider routing, auto-fix policy, and notification destinations. Loaded by both the harness CLI and bugbot CI.

version.description: Config schema version. Must match a supported `insect.eval.v<N>` major.

org_id.description: Optional org identifier. Populated by the platform; ignored by self-hosted harness.

categories.description: Category → policy map. Keys are category names (matching `Finding.category`). Each entry toggles enable, intensity (effort/budget), and a per-category severity floor.

intensity.description: How aggressively to spend tokens / time on this category. `light` = fast pass; `standard` = default; `deep` = full agentic dive.

severity_floor.description: Findings below this severity are dropped before posting.

rules.description: Custom rule definitions. Each entry is an open object referencing a Scorer/Judge module + parameters.

noise_budget.description: Caps on volume of findings per PR/file. Keys are not enumerated to allow tuning; common entries: `max_findings_per_pr`, `max_findings_per_file`, `dedupe_window_days`.

provider_routing.description: Ordered list of `(provider, model)` refs with priority. Position in the array IS the priority; the router tries the first that has budget and matching capabilities.

auto_fix_policy.description: Global auto-fix policy. `off` = never write fixes; `suggest` = include `suggested_fix` payloads but never apply; `commit-on-low-only` = auto-commit low-severity fixes; `commit-all-on-green` = auto-commit any fix that keeps CI green.

notifications.description: Notification destinations (Slack webhook, email list, GitHub PR-comment toggle). Open object — concrete keys are platform-defined.
